user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate complementary 3-phase PWM on GTM TOM1 Cluster_1 at 20 kHz, center-aligned, with 1 µs rising/falling dead time, synchronous start and synchronous update, driving U/V/W pairs on specified pins; provide initGtmTom3phInv(), updateGtmTom3phInvDuty(), and empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction; guard GTM enable/clock; add a GTM ATOM ISR on CPU0 priority 20 toggling P13.0; main loop updates duty every 500 ms using STM ticks.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Upgrade from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to unified IfxGtm_Pwm. Use IfxGtm_Pwm to configure TOM1 Cluster_1 channels as 3 complementary pairs with DTM-based 1 µs dead time, center-aligned mode, and synced start/update. Map pins via IfxGtm_PinMap_TC38x_LFBGA516. Guard GTM enable/CMU CLK0. Provide duty control (0–100%) with wrap/step logic via IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDuty. Set up a basic GTM ATOM0 CH0 interrupt source, install handler with IfxCpu_Irq_installInterruptHandler, enable SRC with IfxSrc_enable, and toggle P13.0 in ISR using IfxPort_togglePin.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level PWM driver requested by the user for upgrade; supports synchronized multi-channel PWM, phase/duty updates, and dead-time control across TOM clusters, fitting a 3-phase inverter on TOM1 Cluster_1.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply stepped duty updates (U/V/W) in percent with wrap rule using synchronized update; dead time can be adjusted if required.

migration_notes.context_preserved: The unified IfxGtm_Pwm driver is used to realize a 3-phase complementary PWM on TOM1 Cluster_1 at 20 kHz, center-aligned, with 1 µs dead time, sync start and sync update, on the exact U/V/W pins requested. Duty handling, wrap rule, GTM clock guarding, empty period callback, and the ATOM ISR toggling P13.0 are all mapped using only verified template APIs and the reference structure is preserved.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
